cl_integration.highlight: Prysm now supports 3 modes: proof generation (via ZKBoost), proof verification, and EL-less verify-only mode
Optional proof spec still based on Gossip; plan to migrate to Gloas soon
Lighthouse and Prysm Kurtosis interop devnet running; devnet launch targeting next week
Max proof size bumped to 400 KiB (interim); likely to exceed 1 MB before prover optimization; ZisK already below 400 KB
Validator proof re-signing proposal deprecated; peer scoring deemed sufficient for DOS prevention

spec_and_witness.highlight: Spec/test release 0.34 adds block test engine format and execution witness compliance dashboard
Next release (imminent) adds schema ID prefix to guest input bytes, chain config in stateless input, and proper public key field population
EIP-7709 proposed at last ACDE for Hegota; simplifies BlockHash resolution in execution witness
Execution witness fixtures found a bug in a BAL implementation, validating test coverage value

guest_program_optimization.highlight: eFrex/ZISK profiling yielded up to 26% reduction in AIR costs: 21% from switching to precompile hash calls; ~0.5% from removing rayon/sync overhead
SSZ serialization rewrite of execution witness planned to replace archive format

zkvm_guest_api_standardization.highlight: 5 standards accepted: RISC-V target (RV64IM), I/O interface, Crypto Accelerator API, termination semantics, memory layout
Two new standards in review: misaligned jump must cause abnormal termination (no rounding); vendor runtime spec (static lib + linker script)
U256 acceleration benchmarked on ZISK: multiplication 2-6x gain, but addition/subtraction mixed or slower; impact on 500 real blocks negligible — not yet standardized
Nethermind ZKVM effectively first to fully comply with unaligned-access standard per Cody's testing

infrastructure_and_verification.highlight: ZKBoost config simplified in Kurtosis package: prover image and guest program links now resolved automatically
Nexus verifier crate separated from prover and integrated directly into ZKBoost; prover container no longer needed for verify-only mode
Formal RISC-V semantics verification of ZISK proving system in progress; external review targeted within weeks

action_items.action: Execution-APIs PR for witness retrieval (withWitness boolean + executionWitness return field) needs review from EL teams
Contribute to open issue on proof type encoding to support generic guest/ZKVM combinations (e.g., native rollup use cases)
ZKVM teams to review and opine on Keccak-F permutation accelerator PR vs. full Keccak function interface

decisions.decision: Validator proof re-signing proposal deprecated; peer scoring is sufficient for DOS prevention
Misaligned jump standard: must cause abnormal termination — no recovery, no address rounding permitted
U256 acceleration interface not yet standardized; further investigation needed on addition/subtraction and bitwise acceleration

targets.target: zkEVM CL integration devnet launch targeting next week
Spec/test release 0.35 (with schema ID, chain config, pubkey fixes) targeting today or tomorrow
